llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 17.1 (AI-Assisted Literacy and Numeracy presentation) was pulled from Information section and moved to occur after school presentations (Taft and Garfield SPSAs) but before the Second Interim Budget discussion. This change was announced during the 'Changes to the Agenda' segment and approved by the board.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll move to approve the consent agenda. Second. I'll second. All those in favor? Aye.
